name: AlphaFold
description: Predict the structure of a protein monomer or multimer given its amino acid sequence. Uses DeepMind's AlphaFold v2.3.2 (implemented by ColabFold). Specify optional additional settings including recycles, MSA depth, custom templates. Receive up to five pdb models, including scores for pTM, PAE, iPTM/iPAE (multimers), and pLDDT.
capabilities: Predict the structure of a protein monomer or multimer given its amino acid sequence
Uses DeepMind's AlphaFold v2.3.2 (implemented by ColabFold)
Specify optional additional settings including recycles, MSA depth, custom templates
Receive up to five pdb models, including scores for pTM, PAE, iPTM/iPAE (multimers), and pLDDT

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence. Use ':' to separate chains for multimers.

numModels.description: Number of structure models to generate

numRecycles.description: Number of recycling iterations through prediction process for refined results

numRelax.description: Number of models to perform amber relaxation for more accurate side chain predictions

useMSA.description: Whether to use multiple sequence alignment. When disabled, runs in single sequence mode.

pairMode.description: MSA sequence pairing strategy. unpaired_paired pairs sequences from same species plus unpaired MSA.

templateFiles.description: Custom structural template CIF files for prediction

recycleEarlyStopTolerance.description: Distance threshold between recycles for early termination. 0 means never stop early.

ipsaeScoring.description: Enable IPSAE scoring for protein-protein complex interfaces

modelType.description: Model architecture to use. Auto selects alphafold2_ptm for monomers and alphafold2_multimer_v3 for complexes.
